billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.general_idea: Add the dotenv-java library to the project dependencies to enable loading environment variables from a .env file.
billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.human_impl: Added 'import io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.Dotenv;' and presumably added the Maven/Gradle dependency for io.github.cdimascio:dotenv-java.

billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.general_idea: Configure the application to load environment variables from a .env file and set them as system properties during startup.
billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.human_impl: Dotenv dotenv = Dotenv.configure().load(); dotenv.entries().forEach(e -> System.setProperty(e.getKey(), e.getValue()));

billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.general_idea: Add Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for getters, setters, and constructors.
Define the data fields for the CategoryRequest class.
billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.human_impl: private String name; private String description; private String bgColor;

billingsoftware/src/main/java/in/shanthi.general_idea: Add Lombok @Data annotation to automatically generate getters, setters, equals, hashCode, and toString methods.
Add Lombok @Builder annotation to enable the builder pattern for object construction.
Add categoryId field to the response object.
Add name field to the response object.
Add description field to the response object.
Add bgColor field to the response object.
Add createdAt field to the response object.

billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Downgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.4.5 to 3.2.5, likely for stability or compatibility reasons.
Add AWS S3 SDK dependency for cloud storage integration.
Add java-dotenv dependency for managing environment variables.
Add Spring Security starter dependency for authentication and authorization.
Add JJWT dependency for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JAXB API dependency, often required for XML binding in newer Java versions.
Add Razorpay Java SDK dependency for payment processing integration.
Add Twilio SDK dependency for SMS functionality.
Explicitly set maven-compiler-plugin source and target to the java.version property.
Define a lombok.version property and use it in annotation processor paths for consistency.
Remove empty license, developer, and SCM metadata blocks from the POM.

billingsoftware/.gitignore.general_idea: Add environment variable files to .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive credentials.

billingsoftware/src/main/resources/appli.general_idea: Replace hardcoded database credentials with environment variable placeholders to support containerized deployment.
Externalize JPA DDL auto configuration to allow runtime configuration via environment variables.
Externalize server servlet context path to allow flexible API routing configuration.
Add configuration properties for AWS S3 integration using environment variables.
Add configuration property for JWT secret key using an environment variable.
Add configuration properties for Razorpay payment gateway integration using environment variables.
Add configuration property for Fast2SMS API key for SMS functionality.

client/package-lock.json.general_idea: Add axios for HTTP client functionality to communicate with the backend API.
Add Bootstrap CSS framework for styling the client application.
Add Bootstrap Icons for UI iconography.
Add Chart.js library for data visualization components.
Add react-chartjs-2 to integrate Chart.js with React components.
Add react-hot-toast for displaying toast notifications.
Add react-router-dom for client-side routing capabilities.
Update ESLint and related packages to latest versions for improved linting and compatibility.
Update Vite build tool to a newer patch version.

client/package.json.general_idea: Add axios for HTTP client functionality to communicate with the backend API.
Add bootstrap for UI styling and component framework.
Add bootstrap-icons for icon assets in the UI.
Add chart.js for data visualization capabilities.
Add react-chartjs-2 to integrate Chart.js with React components.
Add react-hot-toast for user notification toasts.

client/src/index.css.general_idea: Introduce global CSS reset rules and import the Outfit font for consistent styling across the application.
client/src/index.css.human_impl: Added @import for Google Fonts Outfit and a universal selector block setting box-sizing, padding, margin, and font-family.
